hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; b=$(basename "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$b" = "AGENTS.md" ] || [ "$b" = "CLAUDE.md" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"AGENTS.md changed \u2014 run the /audit-rules skill to check for contradictions or drift against the global claude/rules tree before finishing this task."}}'; elif echo "$f" | grep -q '\.claude/agent-memory/.*\.md$'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Agent-memory file changed \u2014 run the /audit-memory skill in a fresh session before /clear to check for stale or duplicated memory."}}'; fi; }
